raw_transcript: Yes. I'm seeing a flickering motion, which we call asterixis, or 'liver flap.' It happens because of the buildup of ammonia in your blood that your liver isn't clearing. Have you noticed your skin or eyes looking more yellow lately?
final_corrected_note: Yes. I'm seeing a flickering motion, which we call asterixis, or 'liver flap.' It happens because of the buildup of ammonia in your blood that your liver isn't clearing. Have you noticed your skin or eyes looking more yellow lately?
